---
title: "15_dataset_balancing"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(ROSE)
library(randomForest)
library(pROC)
library(here)
source(here('scripts', 'clean_columns.R'))

data <- readxl::read_xlsx(here('data', 'raw', 'PCAWG_variables_PCA_woK.xlsx'))

clean_data <- clean_pcawg_data(data) %>%
  drop_na() %>% 
  select(-c(1, 2)) %>%
  mutate(
    alt_status = factor(alt_status),
    alt_status = forcats::fct_recode(
      alt_status,
      "ALT_high" = "ALT-high",
      "ALT_low"  = "ALT-low"
    ),
    alt_status = forcats::fct_relevel(alt_status, "ALT_low", "ALT_high")
  )

summary(clean_data)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r metric-helper}
get_fold_metrics <- function(prob_alt, truth, threshold = 0.5, positive_class = "ALT_high") {
  
  negative_class <- setdiff(levels(truth), positive_class)
  
  pred <- ifelse(prob_alt >= threshold, positive_class, negative_class) %>%
    factor(levels = levels(truth))
  
  cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, truth, positive = positive_class)
  
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
    response = truth,
    predictor = prob_alt,
    levels = c(negative_class, positive_class),
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  
  tibble(
    auc = as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj)),
    sensitivity = unname(cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
    precision = unname(cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"]),
    f1 = unname(cm$byClass["F1"]),
    balanced_accuracy = unname(cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"])
  )
}

summarise_cv_metrics <- function(pred_df, threshold = 0.5) {
  pred_df %>%
    group_by(Resample) %>%
    group_modify(~ get_fold_metrics(
      prob_alt = .x$ALT_high,
      truth = .x$obs,
      threshold = threshold
    )) %>%
    ungroup()
}

summarise_mean_sd <- function(metrics_df, method_name) {
  metrics_df %>%
    summarise(
      across(
        .cols = c(auc, sensitivity, precision, f1, balanced_accuracy),
        .fns  = list(mean = mean, sd = sd),
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    ) %>%
    mutate(method = method_name) %>%
    select(method, everything())
}

make_class_weights <- function(y) {
  tab <- table(y)
  w <- 1 / tab
  weights <- unname(w[as.character(y)])
  weights / mean(weights)
}
```

```{r cv-control}
set.seed(21)

ctrl_none <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 10,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)

ctrl_rose <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 10,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final",
  sampling = "rose"
)

ctrl_smote <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 10,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final",
  sampling = "smote"
)
```

```{r no-balancing}
set.seed(21)

model_no_bal <- train(
  alt_status ~ .,
  data = clean_data,
  method = "glm",
  family = binomial(),
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl_none,
  preProcess = c("center", "scale")
)

pred_no_bal <- model_no_bal$pred %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(obs = factor(obs, levels = c("ALT_low", "ALT_high")))

metrics_no_bal <- summarise_cv_metrics(pred_no_bal)
summary_no_bal <- summarise_mean_sd(metrics_no_bal, "No balancing")

summary_no_bal
```

```{r class-weighting}
set.seed(21)

case_weights <- make_class_weights(clean_data$alt_status)

model_weighted <- train(
  alt_status ~ .,
  data = clean_data,
  method = "glm",
  family = binomial(),
  weights = case_weights,
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl_none,
  preProcess = c("center", "scale")
)

pred_weighted <- model_weighted$pred %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(obs = factor(obs, levels = c("ALT_low", "ALT_high")))

metrics_weighted <- summarise_cv_metrics(pred_weighted)
summary_weighted <- summarise_mean_sd(metrics_weighted, "Class weighting")

summary_weighted
```

```{r metric-helper}
get_test_metrics <- function(prob_alt, truth, threshold = 0.5, positive_class = "ALT_high") {
  
  negative_class <- setdiff(levels(truth), positive_class)
  
  pred <- ifelse(prob_alt > threshold, positive_class, negative_class) %>%
    factor(levels = levels(truth))
  
  cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, truth, positive = positive_class)
  
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
    response = truth,
    predictor = prob_alt,
    levels = c(negative_class, positive_class),
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  
  tibble(
    auc = as.numeric(auc(roc_obj)),
    sensitivity = unname(cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]),
    specificity = unname(cm$byClass["Specificity"]),
    precision = unname(cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"]),
    recall = unname(cm$byClass["Recall"]),
    f1 = unname(cm$byClass["F1"]),
    balanced_accuracy = unname(cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"])
  )
}
```

```{r rose}
set.seed(21)

rose_data <- ROSE::ROSE(alt_status ~ ., data = clean_data)$data

model_rose <- train(
  alt_status ~ .,
  data = rose_data,
  method = "glm",
  family = binomial(),
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl_none,
  preProcess = c("center", "scale")
)

pred_rose <- model_rose$pred %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(obs = factor(obs, levels = c("ALT_low", "ALT_high")))

metrics_rose <- summarise_cv_metrics(pred_rose)
summary_rose <- summarise_mean_sd(metrics_rose, "ROSE")

summary_rose
```

```{r smote}
set.seed(21)

model_smote <- train(
  alt_status ~ .,
  data = clean_data,
  method = "glm",
  family = binomial(),
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl_smote,
  preProcess = c("center", "scale")
)

pred_smote <- model_smote$pred %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(obs = factor(obs, levels = c("ALT_low", "ALT_high")))

metrics_smote <- summarise_cv_metrics(pred_smote)
summary_smote <- summarise_mean_sd(metrics_smote, "SMOTE")

summary_smote
```

```{r final-comparison}
final_comparison <- bind_rows(
  summary_no_bal,
  summary_weighted,
  summary_rose,
  summary_smote
)

final_comparison
```
